programme.desc: Harl attempts to prevent Tippy from bringing the fabled "Mars Door" back to Earth. Tippy Dorman, faces the trial of the century after his attempt to take over the world.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Danny dons powerful dino-mech armor to dig up Cap'n No-Beard's treasure beneath Mt. Sibo, making him more than a match for our heroes ... and a mighty allosaurus that unexpectedly joins the party!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all ... in the form of the T-Rex!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen and Claire must rescue a theme-park reviewer from a sabotaged aerialtram ... and a salivating T-Rex!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Enter the City of Temples
programme.desc: When the Ninja are not invited to the Tournament of Sources, they break into the City of Temples to earn their entry.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: They Gather for the Feast
programme.desc: After earning invitations to the Tournament of Sources, the Ninja attend a banquet for Elemental Masters with friendly faces and old enemies, and Lloyd confronts a familiar face from his vision.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Inside the Maze
programme.desc: Arin continues his investigation into the missing Horns but makes time for Frak, who Sora suspects is working for Ras and Nya's first match pits her against Jay, still with no memory of their past.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have been holed up at the police precinct, but the Sky Pirates track him down. They flee by boat to the lighthouse where Zane’s father was once held captive. Nadakhan learns that the ninja still have the Tiger Widow venom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the midst of an epidemic of mysterious metal thefts by the Vermillion Warriors, Lloyd realizes that stepping up and taking over for the ailing Master Wu is not an easy task.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: Music Talks: Queen Latifah

programme.title: Prince: Purple Reign
programme.desc: In recent times, music lovers have been confounded with the tragic and shocking news that some of their most beloved stars had passed away in controversial circumstances.

programme.title: Johnny Mathis: In Concert
programme.desc: Johnny Mathis is one of a handful of artists who truly deserves a legendary status. Since his impact on scene in the 1950s, Johnny has maintained a high levels of performance, both on recordings and on stage.

programme.title: Janet Jackson: In Control
programme.desc: She may have been the youngest of 10 of the Jackson children, but that did not stop Janet Jackson from embracing her own identity. Her unquestioned talent has built an empire of success as Ms. Janet remains In Control.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Wiz Khalifa
programme.desc: Music superstar Wiz Khalifa gives Larry a lesson in hip-hop culture and shares his excitement over soon becoming a dad. Plus, the tattooed rapper offers Larry some pointers on getting inked.

programme.title: Larry King Now: T.I.
programme.desc: Rapper, author and entrepreneur T.I. stops to by to discuss his highly-anticipated new album, Troubleman, his time in prison, and whether the free agent will sign with a new record label. Plus, T.I. offers his stance on gun control and pot legalization.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Snoop Lion
programme.desc: Larry sits down with Snoop Lion to talk about his new name, look, and faith. Plus, Snoop opens up about why he went from being a gun-toting rapper to spreading messages of non-violence in his new reggae song, "No Guns Allowed."

programme.title: Larry King Now: 50 Cent
programme.desc: You know him as a millionaire mogul at the top of his rap game. In this candid interview, 50 Cent sheds his public image to talk about growing up without a father, what he seeks in a partner & why the media doesn’t know who he really is.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Floyd Mayweather
programme.desc: The world's best pound for pound fighter Floyd 'Money' Mayweather sits down with Larry and talks about his upcoming fight on May 4th, his first since being released from prison this past year.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Oprah Winfrey
programme.desc: Larry sits down with media mogul Oprah Winfrey to talk about her personal experiences with racism, the future of the Oprah Winfrey Network, and her new role in the civil rights film, Lee Daniels' The Butler.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Forest Whitaker and Lee Daniels
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Forest Whitaker opens up about his personal brushes with racism, and why he had to audition for 'The Butler.' Plus, the film's director, Lee Daniels, on his most significant work yet.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Wendy Williams
programme.desc: The always candid Wendy Williams opens up about her rising career in daytime talk. She shares her colorful personality, views on the power of pop culture in everyday life, and her new auto-biography.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Mike Tyson and Evander Holyfield
programme.desc: Larry gets an earful from Iron Mike Tyson and Evander 'The Real Deal' Holyfield on their infamous 1997 bout, the current state of boxing and their new mission to feed the hungry with Yank Barry, the Founder of Global Village Champions.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Terrence Howard
programme.desc: Uncensored and candid, Terrence Howard tackles everything from his ideal woman to Oprah to his (necessary) arrogance. Plus, he reveals the role he really wanted in The Butler, and why it’s hard out there for a pim-- er, Oscar nominee.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Terry Crews
programme.desc: The actor and ex-athlete is all candor as he discusses his awe over the Golden Globes win, how he saved his marriage, and why this man calls himself a feminist. Plus, Larry gets a pec pop tutorial.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Charlamagne Tha God
programme.desc: Charlamagne Tha God dishes on his current relationships with former foe Kanye West and mentor Wendy Williams, his bold style of broadcasting, and why he'll support Hillary in 2016.

programme.title: Jay-Z: Ultimate Hustle

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Bajo los efectos del gas hilarante, Helga deja un mensaje confesando su amor en el contestador de Arnold. / Después de que Harold roba un poco de carne de la carnicería, es sentenciado a trabajar para cumplir su castigo.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold rompe accidentalmente una promesa que le hizo a Iggy y debe enfrentar las consecuencias. / Big Bob contrata a una niñera para Helga. Helga la enfrenta en su propio juego y la obliga a renunciar.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold se vuelve un bateador peligroso y hiere a todos al golpear. Temiendo lastimar más, deja de jugar. / Arnold y Gerald manejan la carrera del inesperado cantante de country, el Sr. Hyunh.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Phoebe acepta perder a propósito para que Helga gane una competencia, pero luego se arrepiente de su decisión. / Los chicos recrean una batalla histórica, pero esta vez su cerdito querido corre peligro de perder la vida.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: El entrenador quiere volver a casarse con Tish y le pide a Arnold que sea su padrino. / Rhonda organiza una fiesta e invita solo a los chicos populares. Arnold va, pero se da cuenta de que la fiesta es solo para snobs.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Gecko Moria's minions struggle with the burden of feeding a giant zombie brought to life by Luffy's shadow. Meanwhile, Brook flashes back to a battle that almost cost him his beloved afro!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The freshly-revived trio of Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji discover that their shadows are missing, and Franky relates Brook's story about a promise he made to a very special whale!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats flash back to the heartbreaking story of Laboon the abandoned whale, and Brook's battle with the zombie samurai reveals the reason behind his intense afro love!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy sets out to regain his shadow and convince Brook to join the crew. Meanwhile, Sanji races to stop Nami's zombie wedding before it's too late!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp's naturally negative personality makes him the only Straw Hat who stands a chance against Perona's depressing army of ghosts, and Chopper prepares to do battle against his hero, Dr. Hogback!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Brook is overmatched by the zombie samurai, Zoro steps in to help the skeleton get his shadow back. Meanwhile, Luffy prepares for a battle with Gecko Moria, and Sanji interrupts an undead wedding!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Despite his furious attempts, Luffy struggles to land a blow against Gecko Moria, but Sanji fares much better in his passionate attempt to defeat Nami's beastly abductor!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After getting the stuffing beat out of him by a zombie teddy bear, Usopp summons his sharp-shooting alter ego to help him discover the secret to defeating Perona!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp reaches deep into his devious bag of tricks to even the odds in his battle with Perona. Meanwhile, Luffy can't lay a finger on Gecko Moria, and a zombie is less than gentlemanly in his battle with Robin!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Franky and Brook watch in awe, Zorro and the zombie samurai wage a sword-slinging battle the likes of which the world has never seen before!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Moria's mansion is reduced to ruins as the zombie with Luffy's shadow stalks the Straw Hats! As the walls come tumbling down, Chopper puts the hurt on Hogback, and Nami vanishes right before Sanji's eyes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: One by one, the Straw Hats attack Oars, but the monstrous zombie appears too powerful to be defeated. Luffy's got his sights set on Moria, but he'd better hurry if he wants to save his crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami wakes up just in time to find out she's about to marry a zombie, but the special occasion is interrupted by very jealous warthog!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: After a long journey, Jotaro and his friends finally reach Cairo. They begin asking about the location of DIO's palace and find one man who says he has information, but will only answer if the group can beat him in a game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 2
programme.desc: After losing to D'Arby, Joseph and Polnareff have their souls taken. In order to have their souls returned, Jotaro shows off Star Platinum's powers before beginning a match with D'Arby, warning him that cheating won't work.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 1
programme.desc: Hol Horse arrives at Cairo in order to pursue Jotaro and the others. He has joined forces with another partner and is after the lives of Jotaro and crew once more. What's more, his new partner is none other than Mondatta.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 2
programme.desc: Following Mondatta's prediction, Hol Horse sticks his fingers into Polnareff's nose, but he doesn't know what to do from there. Making matters worse, Jotaro and the others show up in search of Polnareff, forcing Hol Horse into a tough spot.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends continue to search for DIO's mansion in Cairo. Following Avdol's advice, they have a beggar look for the mansion and wait. Meanwhile, Iggy, wandering the city alone, is confronted by two large dogs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 2
programme.desc: Iggy ends up in a battle to the death in the sewers against Pet Shop, the falcon that guards DIO's mansion. Despite being injured, Iggy runs to the river in an attempt to escape, but he may have underestimated Pet Shop's abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Player, Part 1
programme.desc: Though purchased dearly with Iggy's injury, Jotaro and his group finally have the location of DIO's palace. Waiting for them where they find the butler, Darby Younger, brother of the gambler they previously defeated.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Player, Part 2
programme.desc: The battle for souls with D'Arby continues. Kakyoin challenges D'Arby to a racing game but ends up losing both the race and his soul. Before Joseph really has time to react, Jotaro picks the next game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 1
programme.desc: The baseball game with D'Arby continues within DIO's mansion. For some reason, Jotaro starts telling D'Arby what pitches he'll be throwing. D'Arby finds Jotaro's actions strange, but still believes he has the upper hand because of his Stand's abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 2
programme.desc: After a long, hard journey, the group is suddenly faced with saying goodbye to a friend. Polnareff can't control his emotions and starts brandishing his sword toward an unseen enemy with very little success.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 3
programme.desc: Polnareff is pushed to his limits by Cool Ice's merciless attacks. As he awaits death, the dying Iggy manages to save him at the last minute. Polnareff then stabs Cool Ice in the head. Despite showing resilience to the attacks so far.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 1
programme.desc: Polnareff finally comes face-to-face with DIO. Despite Polnareff's hostility, DIO offers to forgive him and allow the Frenchman to join his side again. Polnareff refuses, but for some reason, he cannot get any closer to DIO.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 2
programme.desc: As night falls, the battle expands to encompass the whole city of Cairo. Amidst the melee, Kakyoin says he has a way to figure out DIO's Stand ability.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 3
programme.desc: Thanks to Kakyoin, Joseph is able to figure out that DIO's Stand, "The World," has the power to stop time, but is quickly defeated by DIO. Jotaro then attacks The World with Star Platinum but is no match for DIO's power.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: With help from Polnareff as well as putting his own life on the line, Jotaro is finally able to land a blow on DIO. Finding the shriveled body of Joseph Joestar, Jotaro becomes enraged and wages his final, desperate battle with DIO!

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Jotaro Kujo! Meets Josuke Higashikata
programme.desc: In April 1999, Jotaro Kujo travels to a town in Japan called Morioh to find a young man named Josuke Higashikata, the secret love child of his grandfather, Joseph Joestar. Upon finding him, Jotaro is surprised to learn that Josuke also possesses a Stand.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Josuke Higashikata! Meets Angelo
programme.desc: Josuke informs Jotaro about his encounter with Angelo’s Stand. Deducing that the serial killer’s Stand is capable of entering people’s bodies, Jotaro tells Josuke over the phone to stay on high alert until he arrives at his home.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Nijimura Brothers, Part 1
programme.desc: Josuke and Jotaro learn that a man with a bow and arrow was responsible for awakening Angelo’s Stand ability. Realizing the town is still in danger, they decide to find the bow and arrow before it can create any more victims.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Nijimura Brothers, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke enters the Nijimura Brothers’ house to rescue Koichi, who is in critical condition after getting shot by Keicho Nijimura’s bow and arrow. But when Josuke steps into the house, he is attacked by Keicho’s Stand.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Nijimura Brothers, Part 3

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Koichi Hirose (Reverb)

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Toshikazu Hazamada (Show Off)
programme.desc: Josuke and Koichi get info that a student at their school, Toshikazu Hazamada may be a Stand user and decide to look into the case. Their suspicions are quickly confirmed after Hazamada’s wooden doll morphs into an exact copy of Josuke and attacks them.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yukako Yamagishi Falls in Love, Part 1
programme.desc: Koichi is both surprised and excited when a girl named Yukako Yamagishi says she likes him. But Koichi’s joy quickly turns into fear after Yukako begins to express her love for him in very erratic and dangerous ways.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yukako Yamagishi Falls in Love, Part 2
programme.desc: Yukako’s dangerous obsession with reshaping Koichi into a man fit for her gets worse, prompting Koichi to hatch an escape plan. He tries to call Josuke for help using a nearby pay phone but is stopped by Yukako, who anticipated his move.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let’s Go Eat Some Italian Food
programme.desc: Josuke and Okuyasu come across an Italian restaurant owned by an Italian chef named Tonio. When Okuyasu asks for the menu, Tonio explains that he decides the menu on the spot based on the customer he sees.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Chili Pepper, Part 1
programme.desc: Chili Pepper suddenly appears before Josuke to test his Stand powers. Josuke puts up a fight but is overwhelmed by Chili Pepper’s power. The next day, Josuke and friends learn from Jotaro that a man who can locate Chili Pepper is heading to Morioh

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Chili Pepper, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke and his friends gather at the Port to try and reach Joseph Joestar before Chili Pepper. Speculating the enemy is hiding nearby, Jotaro orders Josuke and Koichi to stay behind and find Chili Pepper’s user while he and Okuyasu go protect Joseph.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Gracias a la canción de Jigglypuff, el dirigible de Ash y Misty da vuelta a casa, se sale de curso y se estrella en una isla, donde conocen a un nuevo amigo llamado Tracey mientras intenta ayudar a un Lapras perdido.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Misty y Tracey salen a explorar las Islas Naranja, ¡y Ash está decidido a calificar en la Liga Naranja! Pronto descubre que los desafíos del Equipo Naranja son un poco diferentes a las batallas de otros gimnasios.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash, Misty y Tracey llegan a la Isla Mandarina, Pikachu y Togepi se rebelan y se unen a unos Pokémon furiosos. Cuando los Pokémon desaparecen, la Oficial Jenny les habla de la desaparición de docenas de Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash encuentra un mensaje en una botella, el cual lleva a nuestros héroes a una nueva aventura en la Isla Sunburst, y a la búsqueda de un Onix muy especial.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes se encuentran en la Isla Pinkan, hogar de un gran número de Pokémon de colores extraños. Ash y Tracey quedan fascinados con estos Pokémon rosas… ¡al igual que el Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras unirse a una expedición científica para investigar el fósil de un Kabuto, Ash y sus amigos pronto se encuentran enfrentando una serie de desastres naturales.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Otro especialista en los Pokémon tipo Agua reta a Misty a una batalla y le ofrece un consejo: ¡él cree que el Psyduck de Misty está listo para evolucionar!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes conocen a una muy ocupada Enfermera Joy quien debe saltar por toda la isla para cuidar de todos los Pokémon del área. ¿Podrán ayudar a protegerla del Equipo Rocket?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: En el segundo reto de Ash contra el Equipo Naranja, él debe escalar una montaña, construir un trineo y ganar una carrera de trineos. ¿Sus Pokémon tienen lo necesario para superar estos obstáculos?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: La exploración de nuestros héroes los lleva a las Islas Toronja, ¡donde se enteran de que la famosa fruta de la isla ha estado desapareciendo! Ash, Misty y Tracey salen a atrapar a quien sea responsable.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Cuando los buzos recuperan un antiguo trofeo de Campeonato de la Liga Naranja, nuestros héroes van directo al museo de arte donde se exhibe para verlo! Desafortunadamente, el Equipo Rocket ya se les adelantó…

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: El Equipo Rocket se estrella en una isla y Meowth es el centro de atención pues lo confunden con el "Gran Meowth Pródigo", una poderosa criatura de la cual habla una profecía. ¿Qué sucederá cuando descubran la verdad?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Misty no está contenta cuando nuestros héroes aterrizan en una isla llena de Pokémon tipo Insecto, aunque Ash y Tracey la pasan muy bien. Cuando encuentran a un Scyther herido, ¿podrá Misty superar su disgusto y ayudarlo?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash y sus amigos encuentran una maravillosa isla repleta de muchos tipos de árboles frutales, deciden tomarse un descanso y disfrutar su botín. Claro que el Equipo Rocket tiene otra idea…

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes conocen a un par de Entrenadores que no parecen llevarse nada bien, aunque sus Nidoran están obviamente encantados uno con el otro. ¡Misty está decidida a resolver este desafío romántico!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras caminar bajo una tormenta eléctrica, nuestros héroes encuentran a un grupo de Magnemite absorbiendo electricidad de los rayos. Cuando llegan al pueblo para descansar, hay un apagón. ¿Podrán ayudarlos los Magnemite?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: En Ciudad Trovitopolis, Ash y sus amigos escuchan sobre una cierta clase de monstruo que ha estado asustando a todos, y cuando el suelo se resquebraja y los lanza a las cloacas, parece que conocerán al monstruo cara a cara.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Luego de que Misty bucea hacia un remolino para rescatar a una chica, descubre que el hermano de esta, Rudy, está enamorado de ella. Las cosas se complican pues él también es el Líder de Gimnasio al que Ash retará después.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos van en busca de un Pokémon de gran tamaño, pero cuando caen ante un truco del Equipo Rocket, y luego Pikachu y Meowth son secuestrados por un Pidgeot gigante, ¡todos deben trabajar juntos para recuperarlos!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Luego de escuchar hablar de Ash por el Líder de Gimnasio de Isla Trovita, otro Entrenador lo busca para una batalla… y, tras ver derrotado a Pïkachu, Ash utiliza a Charizard. Pero ¿logrará que el Pokémon rebelde lo escuche?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Los planes de nuestros héroes se ven interrumpidos por un incendio devastador en una casa cercana. Cuando intentan combatir las llamas, pronto requieren al departamento de bomberos local: ¡el Equipo Wartortle!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando la Pokébola de Snorlax se rompe, Ash tiene un gran problema en sus manos, ¿cómo lograrán nuestros héroes que el somnoliento Snorlax sobre una montaña llegue al Centro Pokémon más cercano?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash está ansioso por ganar la última medalla de la Liga Naranja, ¡y pronto prueba un poco de la fuerza de esta Líder de Gimnasio cuando ella le ayuda a eludir otro sigiloso ataque del Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.desc: Odo falls in love with a mysterious woman who has been targeted for murder.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Quark accepts a position working for an arms dealer to erase his debts.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The imminent death of Kira's Cardassian "father" rekindles painful memories of losing her real father.

programme.desc: Quark sacrifices his mother's happiness to regain his standing in Ferengi society.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.desc: Sisko and the Defiant crew must choose between the lives they have always known and the lives of their own descendants.

programme.desc: Jake and Nog risk an intergalactic incident in an innocent quest to lift Sisko's spirits.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Deep Space Nine prepares to face a Dominion/Cardassian attack.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko and his crew embark on a secret mission in a captured Jem'Hadar warship.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.desc: Picard and the crew suffer from conflicting emotions when the Enterprise rescues a critically-injured Borg.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Geordi and Ro are pronounced dead after a transporting maneuver from a distressed Romulan ship goes awry.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a mysterious accident, Picard wakes up living the life of another person on a faraway planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Data learns of his own death in late-19th-century San Francisco, a freak accident transports him back to that period.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise crew travels between the 19th and 24th centuries in an attempt to prevent Data's death in 19th century San Francisco.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A young Enterprise engineer is forced to confront his paralyzing fear of being transported.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Troi is drastically transformed when a visiting ambassador secretly uses her to achieve his aims.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Trapped in limbo for 75 years, Star Trek's Scotty awakens to join the Next Generation in the 24th century.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Commander Riker's inability to fall asleep begins to show in other members of the crew in other forms, putting the Enterprise on the trail of a mystery.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When an honor student in the medical field is assigned to the Enterprise in an internship manner, she begins to demonstrate powers of the Q, prompting you-know-who to show up.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: An emergency beam out renders four crewmen down to childhood shortly before renegade Ferengi take over the Enterprise and offload the adults.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A Holodeck fantasy goes awry, sending Worf and his son into a Wild West showdown with a villain who's a dead ringer for Data.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Data risks Picard and Geordi's lives in order to protect another living machine.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After resigning his command to participate in a dangerous secret mission, Captain Picard is taken hostage by the Cardassians.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: To save Kes's life, Janeway must test her own spiritual beliefs by undergoing the secret ritual of an alien religious order.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew visits 20th century Los Angeles to prevent a timeship from destroying the Earth's solar system.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew races against time to stop a 20th century computer industrialist from causing a 29th century disaster.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Kes's body is taken over by the mind of a ruthless political leader who's determined to regain control of his planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway is stunned when Q asks her to be the mother of his child.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway, Neelix and the Doctor must retake Voyager from an infestation of microorganisms.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix's efforts to assist the crew wind up involving him in a deadly narcotics ring.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A Holodeck character's obsession with Tuvok threatens to destroy Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway finds herself trapped in a mysterious time loop, where a series of events repeatedly end in her death.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A Vulcan mating ritual pits Torres against a fellow crewmember, while Chakotay makes a shocking discovery about invaders of a strange planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Chakotay finds a planet of unassimilated Borg drones from all over the galaxy.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After the Doctor adds a mix of new sub-routines to his program, his personality turns violent.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew tries to help the inhabitants of a planet that's being bombarded by deadly asteroids.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Kim becomes convinced he's a native of Taresia, a planet inhabited primarily by women.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Six thousand light-years away, O'Neill and the SG-1 team discover a devastated universe where the inhabitants must live in a protective dome. They survive through an all-controlling computer system called the Link. But is it a savior, or a curse?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 finds a crashed spaceship containing hundreds of people in a cryogenic sleep. Stunned by an unseen weapon, the team is struck unconscious and, upon awakening, discovers that several of the frozen personalities now inhabit Daniel's body!

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay discovers a way for the team to send messages to Earth, allowing the team to send messages to their loved ones as the Wraith approach the city. Sheppard and Teyla leave Atlantis in the hopes of gathering information about the Wraith army.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Plagued by terrifying nightmares, Teyla (Rachel Luttrell) begins to recall a time when she and her father were captured by the Wraith and subjected to disturbing experiments. With the help of an old Athosian woman, Teyla looks deep into her past.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: With a group of Wraith hive ships on the way to Atlantis, the team searches for a place to flee and a way to destroy the city. McKay (David Hewlett) leads a team to try and activate the Ancients' orbital weapons platform to destroy the Wraith.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Just as the team is beginning to lose hope, Col. Everett is sent from the Stargate Program on Earth. As Everett and the team strategize, a new battleship, the Daedalus, arrives with a new Zero Point Module, bringing with it new hope.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team is saved with the arrival of Colonel Steven Caldwell, the Daedalus, and the destruction of the two approaching Wraith ships. McKay hopes the Zero Point Module will be the key to their success, meanwhile Ford seems off after an accident.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard starts to question things when strange malfunctions begin to occur after the team returns from a trip to Earth. The team discovers that the Daedalus has been infected with a Wraith Virus, causing the ship to go into survival mode.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The search for Lt. Ford leads Sheppard and Teyla to planet P3M-736 where they are captured by Ronon Dex, a man who is on the run, being hunted by the Wraith. The team offer to help Ronon, going up against the Wraith once again.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While on Planet Thenora, the team is shocked when McKay and marine officer Laura Cadman are suddenly taken aboard a Wraith Dart. When the team shoots down the Dart, they discover a technical glitch has put Cadman's consciousness in McKay's body.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Locked in a battle with a Drone Command Ship, the Destiny is surprised by the arrival of the aliens that abducted Rush and Chloe. After Destiny's position is revealed, the crew again comes under heavy attack. But this time, they have a plan.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Excitement spreads through the ship as Eli believes he’s found a way to dial Earth. But Dr. Rush has serious reservations about abandoning Destiny, and when the crew is interrupted by a distress call, it may just change the plans of the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Greer and Wray find themselves trapped in the midst of an attack when an alien ship carrying a radioactive bomb crashes into Homeworld Command. Meanwhile, Rush (Robert Carlyle) discovers that not everyone wants Greer and Wray back aboard Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: While connected to the stones in an attempt to contact Homeworld Command, Chloe wakes up with Ginn’s consciousness. Eli must find a way to protect Chloe without losing Ginn. Meanwhile, Volker requires a difficult operation to save his life.

programme.title: The Terror

programme.title: The Terror

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Chester, in search of a better life, is treated with hostility by his fellow Americans. Luz hopes to be accepted by Henry and Asako in their new home as the Japanese American community celebrates Obon, a festival to commemorate the dead.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Japanese Americans are forced to undertake a humiliating exercise that divides the community. Chester comes face to face with a man who forces him to question his very nature. Luz, stricken by grief, is forced to make an important choice.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Donna and Gordon decide to treat themselves to vacation at home instead of camping. Bos and Cameron return to Texas. Ryan and Joe have a revelation.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Joe and Ryan deal with the consequences of Joe's decision. Cameron and Donna fight over the future, while Gordon has a crisis of conscience.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Donna, Bos, and Diane go on the road to build support for Mutiny, while everyone else anxiously awaits the big day. Joe asks Cam for a favor.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Donna envisions a new future for the Internet and attempts to bring everyone together at Comdex. Gordon takes on a strong-willed Joanie.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Capone gets a taste of the underworld in Brooklyn with Johnny Torrio. Reuniting in Chicago, they start bootlegging and anger local Irish gangsters.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: A new mayor forces Torrio and Capone outside Chicago to nearby Cicero. There, Capone's brother Frank fixes an election, placing himself in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: A betrayal destroys peace in Chicago, and Torrio and Capone seek revenge against the Irish gangs. The "Beer Wars" make Capone Chicago's top gangster.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Capone uses the St. Valentine's Day Massacre to assert his power over his enemies. President Hoover takes notice, and Eliot Ness takes on Capone.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny and Bajie get help from an unlikely source, but it comes with a price. The Widow considers a risky gambit, while MK enacts a dangerous plan.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the rainbow fountain stops working, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Plumber and fixes the fountain so that everyone can cool off. // Getting ready for her royal party, Kiki turns purple when she accidentally picks Plumenberries instead of Rainbow Berries.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When young Jessy is afraid of going to the hair salon, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Hairdresser to show Jessy just how fun a visit to the salon can be. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a Dentist to help Jessy with a painful new tooth.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a babysitter to help babysit Jessy who, because of eating a magic bean, has grown into a giant baby! // Rainbow Ruby becomes a choreographer to help Thunderbell apologize to his friend, Mr. Sloth, in a truly musical way.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Kiki's crown loses a jewel, Rainbow Ruby becomes an Archaeologist and follows a map to an ancient treasure. // It's New Year's in Rainbow Village and everyone has gathered for the special dumpling feast.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki's is upset when her garden is a mess. Ruby becomes a gardener and makes the garden lovely. // Mysterious gifts are being left for people across Rainbow Village. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Detective to work out who or what is leaving the gifts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the Rainbow Village train won't stop running on the track, Rainbow Ruby becomes a firefighter to bring the train to a stop. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a fashion designer and makes fantastically fruity outfits to save the day.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a lifeguard to help Ling Ling learn how to swim! //Thunderbell cannot find his beloved pet fish, so Rainbow Ruby becomes a detective to help solve the mystery and learns that the fish was actually a tadpole who is turning into a frog.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a party planner and holds a party that satisfies both Prince Frederick and Princess Kiki. // When the poppies make a mess in Rainbow Village's town square, Rainbow Ruby becomes a clean-up engineer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Something is wrong with Kiki's beloved pomeranian on the day of the Rainbow Village Flower Festival, and Rainbow Ruby becomes a veterinarian to save the pup! // Rainbow Ruby becomes a marine biologist to help an injured baby dolphin return home.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Chirpee's bird friends come for a visit and want to perch on people's heads. // Prince Frederick comes to observe rainbow fish in the lake, only to discover that the water is frozen, and the fish are gone for the season.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The moon is gone, and the villagers can't sleep without his friendly “goodnight, sweet dreams!” // When Thunderbell adds too much bubble bath to his tub, he is trapped in a giant soap bubble.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby becomes an architect to help redesign Felicia's house after it accidentally gets destroyed by Gina. // Gina brings a machine to make rainbow sorbet for everyone.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Thunderbell discovers an unknown, delicious fruit, he eats up all of it at once. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When three little stars run away to Rainbow Village, Rainbow Ruby becomes an astronaut to return them safely to space. // When Kiki breaks a gem given to her by Prince Frederick, she doesn't get a chance to see its special sparkle.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: During a camping trip in the forest, the Rainbow Village friends see a “monster” and almost cancel the trip. // When Princess Kiki chips her leg before a ballet performance, Rainbow Ruby must take the stage to save the day!

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell's scooter breaks, and he must deliver packages on foot, which is slow and painful. // When Ling Ling's group portrait gift is ruined, Rainbow Ruby secretly takes photos and surprises him with a photo album of all of their friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the restaurant is overrun with customers who aren't being served properly, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Waitress. // When Ruby's spilled marbles pour down on Rainbow Village, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Paramedic to treat the wounded.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Jessy's upset because everyone forgot the anniversary of the day she arrived in Rainbow Village. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Chef to cheer her up. // When Ling Ling's cold won't go away, Doctor Ruby discovers his problem is really allergies.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When nobody can understand what roles actors are playing in a performance, Rainbow Ruby designs costumes for the cast! // When Paige gets swept up on a windy day, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Firefighter to bring her to safety.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a Singer and puts on a concert that cheers everyone up! // When Thunderbell forgets to mail invitations to his secret-swap-present party, Rainbow Ruby devises a plan to deliver them just in time.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the field is covered in pokey pods before a rainbow ball tournament, Rainbow Ruby creates a golf game to whack the pods out of the field. // When things go missing in Rainbow Village, it's up to Detective Rainbow Ruby and Choco to find the culprit.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a Pilot to help Chirpee see what it's like to fly, like other birds. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a Fashion Designer and finds the perfect solution to Paige's fashion catastrophe.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula está furiosa con Pedro porque no logra interrumpir la boda, él asegura haberle mostrado el video a la novia, pero ella deja ese asunto para la luna de miel. Gustavo le dice a Paula que la posesión efectiva de la herencia está a punto de salir.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: La verdad atormenta a Juan, sabe que Pedro tiene razón al asegurar que él no ama a Julieta y siente que está pecando al pensar en Paula. Los novios interrumpen la luna de miel y van a la clínica para ver a Pedro.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta le grita a Juan su traición, al dejarle claro que sabe de su infidelidad con Paula antes de llegar al altar y jurarle amor a ella y a su hijo. A Pedro le dan de alta en el hospital. José le dice a Juan que sabe que Paula es su amante.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan descubre el juego sucio de Paula y Pedro, pero Julieta quiere dar pelea por su corazón. Ella lo reta a desafiar a su amante si quiere seguir con su matrimonio, le exige que eche a Paula y a su madre de la hacienda.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro daría lo que le queda de vida por volver a ver a Gabriela. Siente que Verónica besa como ella. Ramón cuenta que Antonia mandó a matar al Tigre y asegura que Alberto hizo detonar la mina. Alejandro y Lucho pelean por el amor de Verónica.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica besa a Lucho y logra mantenerlo a su lado. Ante la insistencia de Alejandro, ella le dice que está comprometida con Lucho. Irene le cuenta a su hermana que Alejandro y Verónica son amantes. Max pierde el trabajo por defender a Valentina.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Ricardo recibe una llamada de Constanza y no puede contener el llanto. Una carta anónima llega a las manos de Gastón. Verónica y Lucho le alertan que se trata de una trampa. Antonia juega con Alberto y después manda a que le den una brutal golpiza.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Los aliados de Verónica la comparan con Antonia. Ricardo está desesperado por encontrar a su madre y sospecha que se esconde tras una burka en la Fortaleza. La policía encuentra a Alberto gravemente herido en plena calle. Lagarto detiene a Max.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela desautoriza a Malcolm en el manejo de las pesebreras y reduce sus atribuciones, las Elizondo ganan terreno en la hacienda. Norma presiente que alguien las vigila en la oscuridad.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena vigila a Fernando y lo sigue a la caballeriza, Malcolm se interpone en su camino, pero ella consigue una pista. Armando le ofrece a Fernando un apartamento para esconder a Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando se aficiona a las apuestas, a Gabriela no le gusta pero acepta bajo presión. Rosario ve a Armando besar a Dínora, él le echa la culpa a ella y se alegra de que su mujer esté celosa.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta se enfrenta a Paula con Juan para vengar su juego sucio y demostrarle que puede ganarle la guerra por el amor de su esposo. Juan le dice que no tienen ningún derecho sobre la hacienda hasta que no salga la posesión efectiva de la herencia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Tight fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. air base in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left--only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.desc: On June 14th, 1997, Floyd Mayweather fought Larry O'Shields in a lightweight bout at the Alamodome in San Antonio, Texas. A young Mayweather showed his impressive speed and agility, earning a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Manny Pacquiao
programme.desc: On May 2nd, 2015, Floyd Mayweather fought Manny Pacquiao in what was labeled as the "Fight of the Century." Floyd Mayweather emerged victorious via a unanimous decision, showcasing his exceptional defensive skills against Pacquiao's aggressive style.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Phillip N'dou
programme.desc: On November 1st, 2003 Floyd Mayweather and Phillip N'dou fought eachother for the WBC world lightweight title at the Van Andel Arena in Grand Rapids with Mayweather ending the bout early for a technical knockout victory

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On April 8th, 2006, Floyd Mayweather fought Zab Judah for the IBF and IBO Welterweight Titles at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. In a fight with a dramatic melee in round 10, Mayweather cruised in the later rounds to win by unanimous decision.

programme.title: Freddie Roach vs Joe Ruelaz
programme.desc: On August 9th, 1984, Freddie Roach fought Joe Ruelaz in a super featherweight bout in Las Vegas. The more experienced Roach made easy work of Ruelaz, stopping him in the fourth round.

programme.title: Freddie Roach vs Mario Chavez
programme.desc: On May 28th, 1981 Freddie Roach faced Mario Chavez at the Hacienda Hotel in Las Vegas resulting in a unanimous decision win for Roach.

programme.title: Genaro Hernandez vs Azumah Nelson
programme.desc: On March 22nd, 1997, Genaro Hernandez fought Azumah Nelson for the World Super Featherweight Championship at the Memorial Coliseum in Corpus Christi. Hernandez looked like the more confident fighter, earning a close split decision victory.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Adilson Rodrigues
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1990 George Foreman fought Adilson Rodrigues at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a victory for Foreman in round two by technical knockout.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Alex Stewart
programme.desc: On April 11th, 1992 George Foreman faced Alex Stewart at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas ending in a majority decision victory for Foreman.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Gerry Cooney
programme.desc: On January 15th, 1990 George Foreman and Gerry Cooney fought at the Reno-Sparks Convention Center in Reno, Las Vegas ending in a majority decision victory for Foreman.

programme.title: George Kambosos vs Devin Haney 1
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2022 George Kambosos and Devin Haney fought for the first time at Marvel Stadium in Melboure for the IBF, WBA, WBC & WBO World lightweight titles resulting in a victory for Devin Haney.

programme.title: Giovani Santillan vs Angel Ruiz
programme.desc: On October 15th, 2021 Giovani Santillan and Angel Ruiz fought eachother in a 10 round bout at the Pechanga Arena in San Diego resulting in a victory for Santillan.

programme.title: Hector Camacho vs Sugar Ray Leonard
programme.desc: On January 3rd, 1997 Hector Camacho faced Sugar Ray Leonard at the Convention Center in Atlantic City battling for IBC Middleweight title the bout ended after five rounds resulting in a victory for Leonard by technical knockout.

programme.title: Humberto Soto vs Urbano Antillon
programme.desc: On December 4th, 2010, Humberto Soto fought Urbano Antillon for the WBC World Lightweight Title at the Honda Center in Anaheim. In a very close fight that could have gone either way, Soto came out on top victorious via an unanimous decision win.

programme.title: Iran Barkley vs Thomas Hearns 1
programme.desc: On June 6th, 1988 Iran Barkley faces Thomas Hearns for the first time at the Las Vegas Hilton Center they battle for the WBC World Middleweight title with the bout lasting 3 rounds resulting in a victory for Barkley.

programme.title: Iran Barkley vs Thomas Hearns 2
programme.desc: On March 20th, 1992 Iran Barkley and Thomas Hearns fought for a second time at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas for WBA World Light heavyweight title, the fight resulted in a split decision win for Barkley.
